segments.beat: Overhead close-up of clear-shell device flat on surface; hand enters frame, fingers resting on buttons — static product reveal
Hand lifts device; angled overhead view shows PCB internals through transparent top shell
Device tilted/rotated in hand; transparent side and bottom shell panels fully visible; PCB traces, chips, and components through resin
Screen-side face angled toward camera; blue display glow activates on transparent pane — active gaming state
Fingers pressing D-pad and A/B buttons while display stays lit; hands-on retro gaming interaction
Device pulled back to show full form factor in palm; pocket-scale size relative to hand evident
Device laid down or rotated to reveal USB-C port edge and component-side detail; logo/branding text appears on screen

demonstrates.motion_value: high — camera orbit + tilt continuously reveals PCB, chips, and traces through all shell faces
high — blue pixel glow visible through transparent pane while buttons pressed
medium — full device held in single palm, size ratio clear
medium — active D-pad and button presses with lit display
medium — premium resin surface and clean PCB layout visible through shell
low — USB-C port and PCB component detail briefly visible
low — overall object aesthetic and clarity suggest premium collectible but no dedicated beauty shot

selection_note: Best available transparency + active-display combo in a single continuous clip; strong hero candidate for see-through display claim.

aesthetics.weakness: extreme close-up entire clip; framing cuts off product edges, heavy black pillarboxing
aesthetics.note: handheld macro of PCB internals; no pull-back, no surface context
